risk_if_not_implemented: Without Grievance Response, the organization may lack capability to detect, contain, or recover from security incidents effectively.

compensating_control_1.name: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the identification and implementation of relevant statutory, regulatory and contractual controls.
compensating_control_1.justification: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance (CPL-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Grievance Response (CPL-07.1) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Data Subject Empowerment
compensating_control_2.justification: Data Subject Empowerment (PRI-06) provides privacy protection that compensates for the absence of Grievance Response (CPL-07.1) by applying alternative privacy safeguards to protect personal data and honor data subject rights. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
